name: vivus
when_to_use: 把已有 SVG(logo/图标/插画/签名/图表)做手绘/线描揭示(stroke-dashoffset)时用它;给现有 SVG 描边绘制用它,预烘焙复杂矢量动画用 lottie-web(已在目录)。你提供带描边的 SVG,vivus 测量各 path 长度并编排绘制顺序/时序。
why_valuable: 测量每条 path 长度并跨多 path 按正确顺序编排 dashoffset 时序很痛;AI 常搞砸多 path 的绘制顺序与时序。

data_in.note: 目标是一个已存在的 SVG;其 path 必须有 stroke、fill:none 才看得到描边。type 决定绘制编排,duration 单位是帧。默认 start:'inViewport' 会装 window scroll 监听。

schema.target: string id(document.getElementById)| SVGSVGElement 节点 —— 传节点可命中 shadow

options?.start?: 'inViewport' | 'manual' | 'autostart' —— 触发方式,默认 'inViewport'(装 window scroll 监听);shadow 用 'autostart'/'manual'
options?.animTimingFunction?: Vivus.LINEAR | Vivus.EASE | Vivus.EASE_IN | Vivus.EASE_OUT | Vivus.EASE_OUT_BOUNCE —— 整体缓动
options?.pathTimingFunction?: 同上 —— 单条 path 缓动
options?.reverseStack?: boolean —— 反转绘制顺序,默认 false

spec.note: SVG 由自身 viewBox/width/height 定尺;其 path 必须 stroke、fill:none 才见描边;勿用 vh。

boot.codex:
import Vivus from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vivus@0.4.6/+esm';
const v = new Vivus(data.target ?? 'my-svg', data.options ?? { type: 'oneByOne', duration: 150, start: 'autostart' });

example._why: target 传 SVG 的 id;type 只在 delayed/sync/oneByOne/scenario/scenario-sync 取值。

uplink: 纯 display,默认不上行;若需绘制完成事件,消费 AI 用 Vivus 原生 onready 回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:传 SVG 节点(id 查找是 document 域);start 设 'autostart'/'manual' 跳过 window scroll 监听;vivus 只改 shadow 内 SVG 的 path
carriers.codex: supported:default export + SVG 描边,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm default export(b as default)= Vivus(element_or_id, options, callback);构造器接受 SVGSVGElement 或字符串 id(document.getElementById(t));start 枚举 ['inViewport','manual','autostart'],默认 e[0]='inViewport' → window.addEventListener('scroll', …)(grep);type 默认 'delayed',duration 默认 120 帧(l(t.duration,120))。globalStyleInjection=no;globalDomMutation=no:只改目标 SVG 的 path stroke-dasharray/dashoffset;grep 到 0 处 document.head、0 处 document.body append、0 处 window.* 赋值。globalEvents=conditional:window 'scroll' 监听仅在 start:'inViewport'(默认)时装 —— 'autostart'/'manual' 不装。shadowCompatible=conditional:传 SVG 节点(id 查找为 document 域)且用 start:'autostart'/'manual'。

en.when_to_use: Use it to give an existing SVG logo, icon, illustration, signature, or chart a hand-drawn/line-reveal effect with stroke-dashoffset. Use it to draw the strokes of an existing SVG; for pre-rendered complex vector animation use lottie-web from the catalog. You provide a stroked SVG, and vivus measures every path length and orchestrates drawing order and timing.
en.why_valuable: Measuring every path and orchestrating dashoffset timing in the correct order across many paths is painful; AI often gets multi-path drawing order and timing wrong.

data_in.note: The target is an existing SVG. Its paths need stroke and fill:none for the line drawing to be visible. type determines drawing orchestration, and duration is in frames. The default start:'inViewport' installs a window scroll listener.

schema.target: string id (document.getElementById) | SVGSVGElement node -- Passing the node can target content inside shadow

options?.duration?: number -- Total duration in frames; default 120
options?.delay?: number -- Interval in frames for oneByOne/delayed
options?.start?: 'inViewport' | 'manual' | 'autostart' -- Trigger mode; default 'inViewport', which installs a window scroll listener. Use 'autostart'/'manual' in shadow
options?.animTimingFunction?: Vivus.LINEAR | Vivus.EASE | Vivus.EASE_IN | Vivus.EASE_OUT | Vivus.EASE_OUT_BOUNCE -- Overall easing
options?.reverseStack?: boolean -- Reverse drawing order; default false

spec.note: The SVG is sized by its own viewBox/width/height. Its paths need stroke and fill:none for line drawing to appear. Do not use vh.
